full_text:
Sima Yi (Zhongda) 司馬懿 (仲達)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sima Yi (司馬懿), styledZhongda (仲達), was born in Wen County, Henei Prefecture (Presently Wen County in He Nan Province). A skilled advisor of the Wei kingdom. His efforts laid the foundation of Jin. Sima Yi was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty. Sima Yi lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
Return to theThree Kingdoms Encyclopediaor browse theEncyclopedia Directory.
